reasoning: For the first resolution date (May 18, 2025), FIDE ratings are updated monthly (on the 1st), so the Wikipedia list on May 18 will be identical to May 11, making an increase >1% effectively impossible. A 1% increase requires her to gain ~25 Elo points. For the June 10 date, achieving a 25-point gain in just the month of May requires a highly notable tournament performance, which is rare for players at the 2500 level. As the horizon extends to August and November, she will have more tournament opportunities to accumulate rating points. Since her peak rating previously exceeded 2530, a 25+ point return to 2519+ over a 6-month period is highly plausible, though not the baseline expectation, so probabilities rise correspondingly to reflect increasing uncertainty.
